channel.title: Schrodinger Bridge on revsic | ML Researcher

item.title: [Survey, WIP] Likelihood-based Generative Models
item.description: Survey of Likelihood-based Generative Models Keyword: VAE, Normalizing Flows, Neural ODE, Energy-based Models, Diffusion Models, Score Models, Schrodinger Bridge, Rectified Flows, Flow Models, Consistency Models, Flow Map Models, Distribution Matching Distillation, Drifting Models Abstract
